Name: Music Festival
Description: Large-scale outdoor or indoor music events featuring multiple artists and stages.

Name: Film Festival
Description: Curated screenings of films from around the world, often including awards and industry events.

Name: Basketball
Description: Professional or amateur basketball tournaments and championship events.

Name: Tennis
Description: Professional tennis tournaments ranging from local opens to Grand Slam competitions.

Name: Art Exhibition
Description: Exhibitions showcasing visual art, sculpture, and installations from established and emerging artists.
